content:
**Morning Nudge — 07:00 SAST Summary**

Good morning Tumelo! Robusca here with your Friday morning check-in.

---

**1. Shopify Orders** ⚠️
- **Status:** Still blocked — no Admin API token
- Last night's orders: **Unknown** — system can't access Shopify
- From July 2nd: 0 orders synced, R0 revenue
- **Action needed:** Shopify Admin API token still required to unlock

---

**2. AgentMail** 🔴
- charlie@agent.studexmeat.com & ceo@agent.studexmeat.com — **Not accessible**
- send.studexmeat.com domain: DNS MISSING (GoDaddy MX/SPF/DKIM not configured)
- stud.exchange domain: PENDING DNS
- **Action needed:** DNS setup required on GoDaddy before email works

---

**3. Naledi's Content Queue** 🔴
- Meta token expired June 22 — Naledi **cannot post** to Facebook or Instagram
- Blotato: 0 accounts connected, FB/IG needs connecting in Blotato dashboard
- No content went live yesterday
- **Action needed:** Meta token refresh + Blotato account connection

---

**4. Meta Ad Spend** 🔴
- **Status:** Inaccessible — Meta token expired
- No campaign performance data available
- **Action needed:** Re-authorise Meta app to restore ad access

---

**✅ What's Working:**
- Landing page live: https://vbdpbts7b5ba.space.minimax.io (ready for ad testing once token is refreshed)
- VM (Orgo.ai) running normally

---

**⚠️ Critical Blockers (unchanged from yesterday):**
1. Shopify Admin API token
2. Meta permanent access token (expired Jun 22)
3. send.studexmeat.com DNS (GoDaddy)
4. GitHub credentials (push blocked on this instance)

---

**Recommendation:** The blockers are systemic — none of the daily operations can run without resolving items 1–3 first. If you can action the GoDaddy DNS and get a Shopify Admin API token today, we can start making progress.

**DONE** — but with significant items needing your attention.

EMAIL_DRAFT:

**From:** robusca@agent.studexmeat.com
**To:** tumelor001@gmail.com
**Subject:** 📋 StudEx Morning Brief — Fri 3 Jul 2026

---

Good morning Tumelo — here is your StudEx Meat morning briefing for Friday, 3 July 2026.

---

📦 **ORDERS & REVENUE**
• Shopify Admin API token still not received — no orders or revenue data visible.
• Last confirmed data: zero orders confirmed for Tue 30 Jun.
• ⚠️ Blocker: Shopify Admin API token with `read_orders` + `read_products` scopes needed from your end.

📱 **CONTENT & SOCIAL**
• Facebook User Token expired 27 Jun — Meta social access remains cut off.
• Youth Day content window (30 Jun) — status unknown due to expired token. Cannot confirm if posts went live.
• ⚠️ Blocker: Facebook User Token and Page Token need refreshing urgently.

🔧 **WHAT WAS BUILT / COMPLETED**
• Robusca OS build completed Tue 30 Jun 01:00 — VM environment healthy and accessible.
• Credential onboarding checklist and VM pre-flight script prepared by Robusca, ready to execute once tokens are available.
• AgentMail DNS fix for `send.studexmeat.com` remains in progress (MX records pending).

🎯 **TODAY'S TOP 3 PRIORITIES**
1. Refresh Facebook + Meta access tokens (manual auth required — visit Meta's token debugger to re-authorise).
2. Provide Shopify Admin API token so delivery agent can pull live order data.
3. Verify whether Youth Day content was posted — if not, Naledi should publish a catch-up post this weekend.

🚫 **BLOCKERS REQUIRING YOUR ACTION**
• Shopify Admin API token — biggest operational blind spot.
• Facebook / Meta token refresh — unlock social + ad data.
• Meta Marketing API credentials (Business App ID + Ad Account ID + `ads_read`) — for ad performance visibility.

---

That's all for now. Robusca is standing by for credentials.

📅 StudEx Morning Brief — Fri 3 Jul 2026 | Generated 07:00 SAST by Robusca

**Midday Status — Friday, 3 July 2026 (12:00 SAST)**

**1. Orders today**
Shopify still blocked — no Admin API token. 0 orders in system. No new orders via any connected channel.

**2. Content**
Meta token still expired (since Jun 22). Naledi can't post. Blotato: 0 accounts connected, FB/IG not linked. Nothing scheduled or live.

**3. Inventory alert**
No data — no inventory monitoring active. Products running low is unknown.

**4. ONE thing to handle right now**
**Farm provenance cards** — this was due today (Jul 3). Suppliers need to deliver the cards so StudEx can display farm provenance to customers. No tracking system is in place yet — consider nudging suppliers directly.

**Supporting context:**
- Landing page ✅ live (waiting for paid traffic)
- Alfardan outreach — no reply yet from Jun 30 email
- DNS for send.studexmeat.com still INVALID — email sending blocked

No new orders to fulfill. No social posts queued. The pipeline is blocked on credentials (Shopify + Meta) more than anything else today.

Commit succeeded, push failed (no GitHub credentials on this instance — noted in standup). All work is done locally. Here is the standup as it will be delivered:

---

📋 **End of Day Standup — Friday, 3 July 2026 | 17:00 SAST**

---

**1. Orders Fulfilled Today**
- **0 orders** — Shopify Admin API token still blocked
- Revenue: **R0**

**2. Content Posted**
- Nothing live. Meta token still expired (Jun 22) — Naledi can't post. Blotato still 0 accounts connected.

**3. Ad Performance**
- No data — Meta Business Suite inaccessible due to expired token. No active campaigns confirmed. Landing page (https://vbdpbts7b5ba.space.minimax.io) live but no paid traffic yet.

**4. Tomorrow Priorities**
1. Shopify Admin API token — unblocks orders
2. Meta token refresh — restores posting + ad data
3. send.studexmeat.com DNS fix (GoDaddy)
4. Blotato FB/IG connection
5. Facebook/Instagram ad campaign launch — target SA Muslim families 25–45
6. Farm provenance cards from suppliers (was due today)
7. Alfardan reply follow-up

---

⚠️ **Blockers unchanged:** Shopify token, Meta token, DNS, no GitHub push credentials on this instance.

**GitHub sync:** Committed locally but push failed — will need credentials on a different session or manual push.

**Obsidian vault:** Updated at `daily/2026-07-03.md` ✅

EOD vault sync complete. Here's the summary:

---

**Git:**

**Heartbeat state updated** — vault_sync.last_sync = 2026-07-03 22:00 UTC

---

**Today's scorecard:**
- Revenue: R0 | Orders: 0 | Content posts: 0
- Built: Caviar B2B landing page live at `gdj07natti0i.space.minimax.io`
- Research: B2B coffee market + Blotato/n8n automation tools
- Plans filed: Agent Fleet Master, Home OS, OS Redesign + RocketChat
- Blockers unresolved: Shopify token, Meta token, send.studexmeat.com DNS, Blotato unconnected

**Top priority for tomorrow:** Connect Blotato to Facebook + Instagram. It's a 5-minute dashboard action, unblocks the entire content flywheel, and is the single highest-leverage move available right now.
